source.title: How Many Packages Are De Minimis Shipments? Stats for 2026 (ShipMatrix data)

extractions.claim: Temu US daily package volume dropped from ~1 million/day (late 2023-2024) to ~250,000-300,000/day after de minimis elimination, a ~70% decline.
extractions.evidence: Temu and Shein were each shipping an estimated one million packages a day on average in the U.S. (ShipMatrix, late 2023). In July 2024 alone, each provided carriers with about 900,000 packages daily. Temu's marketplace platform now ships roughly 250,000-300,000 packages daily, covering electronics, home goods, and consumer products.

verification.verifier_notes: Peak volumes from ShipMatrix (WSJ Dec 2023, Supply Chain Dive Jul 2024). Current volumes from Red Stag Fulfillment 2026 analysis. The ~70% decline is computed from these data points.

extractions.claim: US total domestic parcel market hit record 23.9 billion shipments in 2025 (+0.4% volume, +4.1% revenue to $196B), per ShipMatrix.
extractions.evidence: Total U.S. domestic parcel market revenue reached $196 billion, increasing 4.1% annually, with volume growing 0.4% to 23.9 billion parcels — a new all-time high.

verification.verifier_notes: ShipMatrix data reported by Logistics Management

extractions.claim: Temu delivery times have shifted to a 3-tier model: Express Local Warehouses (2-5 days), Semi-managed US sellers (5-10 days), and China-direct (10-25 days for remaining items).
extractions.evidence: Temu's 2026 model operates across three distinct fulfillment tiers: Express Local Warehouses in Nashville TN, Leipzig Germany, Osaka Japan, Sydney Australia delivering within 2-5 business days; standard shipping 6-20 days; express options 4-9 days. Items labeled 'Local Warehouse' ship fastest. Stockouts at domestic facilities cause 3-5 additional days delay.

verification.verifier_notes: Delivery time ranges from NextSmartShip 2026 update, FletchApp, and CFC Fulfillment guides. Nashville, Leipzig, Osaka, Sydney locations from Alibaba/NextSmartShip.
